features: Easy to install and no tools required.
Compatible with GoPro Hero 13 / Hero 12 / Hero 11 / Hero 10 / Hero 9 Black camera perfectly.

This lightweight replacement battery cover side door is made of aluminum alloy, it offers better protection for your camera battery and durable for long term use. It is built-in EVA foam matt to provide the battery better protection.

The side door battery cover reserved hole for Hero 13 / 12 / 11 / 10 / 9 Black camera's type C charging port, more convenient to charge your camera without removing the battery door cover. It’s perfect for continuous shooting especially for recording time lapse or video.
This battery cover also allows you connect your action camera with an external microphone without removing the side door. Very convenient for vlog and recording.
